name: create_payout
description: List payouts from GoCardless showing when collected funds are transferred to your bank account. Payouts are created automatically by GoCardless when funds are available. This endpoint lists them with filtering and pagination. You cannot create payouts manually -- they are generated by the system based on your payout schedule.

parameters.name: created_at[gte]
parameters.description: Filter payouts created on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: created_at[lte]
parameters.description: Filter payouts created on or before this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return per page. Default 50, max 500.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Pass the ID from the last record of the previous page.
